name: Sketchbook Saturday | Isha Patel
description:
Sketchbook Saturday
Sketchbooks are a private, and intimate space for artists to think, experiment, and try new ways of designing or creating art. Sketchbook Saturday is a bi-monthly event that sees artists from the Penciljam community sharing their Sketchbooks and creative process.
About the Artist
Isha Patel, an artist and interior designer whose work explores the relationship between space, structure, texture, and materiality. Drawn to both architecture and the natural world, she documents places and quiet moments as lived experiences rather than static subjects. Through a combination of watercolor washes and detailed linework, her practice captures atmosphere, memory, and a sense of presence. Her work reflects a personal approach to observation—one rooted in slowing down, paying attention, and engaging deeply with the built and natural environment. Each piece becomes a record of connection, interpretation, and thoughtful exploration.









Isha's IG profile |@aaart_ishh
How to attend this session

 	The session starts at 11am on Saturday. It will be streamed on Discord. Click here to join our server.
 	If you don't have the Discord app, it will prompt you to download it.
 	Once you have joined the discord server, scroll down in the menu and find an AV Channel called Namma Livestream. The session will be streamed in this channel 11am onwards.

name: Penciljam Bengaluru at IGMF
description:
We are drawing the Military Memorial / Indira Gandhi Musical Fountain Park (IGMF) this Sunday.

The National Military Memorial (NMM) in Bengaluru is a beautiful park that stands as a solemn tribute to India’s fallen soldiers. The park also features exhibits such as military vehicles such a battle tanks, APCs, a fighter jet and a scale model of a battleship.
Read more about IGMF here.
How to join this session
You don't need artistic skill to participate in this event - just boundless curiosity and a love for drawing. To connect with other participants, please use our community on Discord.
If this is your first time and would like future update on events, and more. Please register here.

Once you arrive at the location, choose a spot you'd like to sketch and get comfortable.
Things to carry for this session

 	A sketchbook/paper/drawing surface
 	Pencils or any medium you would like to try out
 	A portable chair/mat. If the location has no seating, we tend to sit on the ground
 	Water bottle and snacks

How to get there
This building is opposite the Planetarium
Follow the location map provided
Closest metro station: Vidhana Soudha (950m from Military Museum)

name: Penciljam Bengaluru at National Gallery of Modern Arts
description:
Manikyavelu Mansion, once home to businessman-turned-aristocrat Vilum Manickavelu Mudaliar, was acquired by the government at an auction. Restored and repurposed, it became the southern centre of the National Gallery of Modern Art (NGMA) in 2009. Read more on NGMA here.
How to join this session
You don't need artistic skill to participate in this event - just boundless curiosity and a love for drawing. To connect with other participants, please use our community on Discord.
https://penciljam.com/main/community/

If this is your first time and would like future update on events, and more. Please register here.

Once you arrive at the location, choose a spot you'd like to sketch and get comfortable.
Rules at this location
No large easels are not allowed within the Gallery.
No wet media allowed inside the gallery/exhibit spaces
Be mindful to not block the walking paths.
Cafeteria is a billable space, so please order something if you choose to sit here.
Things to carry for this session

 	A sketchbook/paper/drawing surface
 	Pencils or any medium you would like to try out
 	A portable chair/mat. If the location has no seating, we tend to sit on the ground
 	Water bottle and snacks

How to get there
Follow the location map provided
Closest metro station: Vidhan Soudha (walk towards the Gallery, about 20 mins)
